DP.354.0006:
What would you like to do with
[0103,0000]’s Mail?
DP.354.0007:
The message will be lost.
Is that OK?
DP.354.0008:
The message was erased.\f
Let a Pokémon hold this Mail?
DP.354.0009:
The Mail’s message was erased,
and it was put in the Bag.
DP.354.0010:
Your Bag is full...
The Mail was discarded.
DP.354.0011:
Stopped making the Pokémon
hold Mail.
